sources.title: The Wake | Full Horror Movie | Happy Halloween!
sources.description:
The Wake - Five friends attend the wake of the young boy they accidentally killed a few days earlier, only to find themselves entrapped in what may become a funeral of their own.
2017.  Stars: Bryan Brewer, Allie Rivera Quiñonez, Darla Delgado

sources.title: The Wake + Elder Island | Horror Double Feature | Halloween Horror Movies
sources.description:
The Wake: Five friends attend the wake of the young boy they accidentally killed a few days earlier, only to find themselves entrapped in what may become a funeral of their own.
2017.  Stars: Bryan Brewer, Allie Rivera Quiñonez, Darla Delgado

Elder Island:  A documentary film crew arrives at Elder Island to investigate the legend of a reverend who returns from the dead to seek vengeance on the descendants of those who murdered him over 150 years ago. They find that some legends are more real and dangerous than they believed.
2016 .  Stars: Jamie Bernadette, Jordan Trovillion, Dan Hicks

metadata.Plot: A group of friends attend the wake of a child they accidentally killed with their car. Once at the wake, they find themselves trapped and stalked by a masked assailant.
metadata.Actors: Bryan Brewer, Allie Rivera Quiñonez, Darla Delgado
